# Oryele

> Oryele is an enterprise execution platform for governed AI digital workers, workflow automation, document intelligence, communications, integrations, analytics, and operational control.

## Primary pages
- [Home](https://oryele.ai/): Company and platform overview
- [Platform](https://oryele.ai/platform): Enterprise execution platform
- [Digital Workforce](https://oryele.ai/digital-workforce): Governed AI digital workers
- [Workflow Engine](https://oryele.ai/workflow-engine): Workflow orchestration
- [Solutions](https://oryele.ai/solutions): Industry and operational solutions
- [Accounting](https://oryele.ai/accounting): Accounting-firm workflows
- [Insurance](https://oryele.ai/insurance): Insurance workflows
- [Legal](https://oryele.ai/legal): Legal workflows
- [Integrations](https://oryele.ai/integrations): Enterprise integrations
- [Trust](https://oryele.ai/trust): Security, governance, and trust
- [Resources](https://oryele.ai/resources): White papers and resources
- [Contact](https://oryele.ai/contact): Contact and enterprise briefing

## Policies
- [Privacy](https://oryele.ai/privacy)
- [Terms](https://oryele.ai/terms)
- [Cookie Policy](https://oryele.ai/cookies)
- [SMS Consent](https://oryele.ai/sms-consent)
